title: Instant Family
subTitle: Pete and Ellie Wagner, a couple, decide to adopt three siblings Lizzie, Juan and Lita. But trouble knocks at their door when the children's troublesome birth mother is back in the frame.

title: Laggies
subTitle: In the throes of a quarter-life crisis, Megan panics when her boyfriend proposes. She takes an opportunity to escape for a week, hiding out in the house of her new 16-year-old friend Annika and her world-weary single dad.

title: St. Vincent
subTitle: Maggie, a working single mother, allows Vincent, a hedonistic misanthrope, to babysit her 12-year-old son Oliver. Soon, a beautiful friendship develops between Vincent and Oliver.

subTitle: The host invites prominent personalities and engages them in candid conversations about their personal and professional lives.

title: Pudsey the Dog: The Movie
subTitle: Pudsey, a cheeky stray dog from London, is happy being alone until he meets Molly, George and Tommy. As he settles in with his new family, Pudsey discovers Thorne and Fautus are planning something terrible for the village, and he must stop them.

title: Bridget Jones's Baby
subTitle: After breaking up with Mark, Bridget meets a handsome stranger, Jack. Soon, Bridget finds out that she is pregnant but is unsure about the identity of the father.

title: The Rewrite
subTitle: Keith Michaels, an Oscar-winning writer, teaches at the Binghamton University on the East Coast after losing his popularity in Hollywood and falls in love with Holly, a fellow teacher.

title: Monte Carlo
subTitle: Grace, who is vacationing in Paris with her friends and stepsister, is mistaken for a British heiress. Later, the three women are whisked away to Monte Carlo, where they discover royalty and romance.

title: The Gold Rush
subTitle: During the Klondike Gold Rush, a lone prospector goes through a series of misfortunes, including a blizzard and starvation. However, he finds love even in the stormy Alaska.

title: Eat Pray Love
subTitle: Elizabeth Gilbert's perfect world comes shattering down when she gets divorced. She then embarks on a journey across the world in an attempt to rediscover her true self.

title: America's Sweethearts
subTitle: When Kiki helps facilitate a final public appearance between her famous boss and her estranged husband, she experiences an unexpected spark of attraction and falls for him.

title: The Smurfs
subTitle: While trying to escape the evil wizard Gargamel, the blue-skinned Smurfs get sucked into a vortex that teleports them to New York. Thereafter, they try their best to find a way back home.

title: Safe Haven
subTitle: A mysterious young woman arrives in Southport, North Carolina, and falls in love with a widowed store owner. However, her dark past intrudes in her new life.

title: Monster-in-Law
subTitle: After several failed blind dates, a woman finally finds the man of her dreams, but his mother goes to great lengths to ruin their relationship.

title: Miss You Already
subTitle: Milly and Jess find their lifelong friendship and lives turned upside down when Milly gets diagnosed with breast cancer while Jess is trying to start a family.

title: Miss You Already

title: StreetDance 2
subTitle: After an embarrassing defeat, a street dancer, Ash, assembles the best dancers from all across the world for another round against the Invincible crew.

title: Land of the Bears
subTitle: The filmmaker shines a light on the lives of five wild brown bears inhabiting the Kamchatka Peninsula, exploring their daily adventures and activities.

title: Lay the Favorite
subTitle: Ambitious about living the life of a cocktail waitress, a lap dancer tries her luck in Las Vegas. However, her life takes an unexpected turn after she falls in love with a sports gambler.

title: The Starving Games
subTitle: In a deadly game orchestrated by President Snowballs, skilled archer Kantmiss Evershot, her boyfriend Dale and tech-savvy ally Peter Malarkey must rely on their wits and skills to survive.

title: StreetDance 2
subTitle: After an embarrassing defeat, a street dancer, Ash, assembles the best dancers from all across the world for another round against the Invincible crew.

title: The Way, Way Back
subTitle: Duncan, a shy teenager, visits a beach house owned by his mother's boyfriend. Annoyed with everyone, he wanders away to a local water park and meets Owen, who helps him open up to the world.

title: Just Like Heaven
subTitle: When grieving architect David moves into a new apartment, he finds the spirit of the last tenant, workaholic doctor Elizabeth, still very much in-residence.

title: Bridget Jones's Diary
subTitle: A neurotic thirty-something woman resolves to finally take control of her life once and for all, while looking for h love.

title: Bad Teacher
subTitle: With the intention of getting a breast implant, Elizabeth becomes a high school substitute teacher. However, when she learns about a bountiful bonus, she strives to get her students the highest marks.

title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
subTitle: An advice columnist attempts to make a man dump her in 10 days, but he makes a bet with his boss that he will make her fall in love with him.

title: What Men Want
subTitle: Passed up for a well-deserved promotion, sports agent Ali Davis wonders what else she needs to do to succeed in a man's world. Hoping to find answers from a psychic, Ali drinks a weird concoction that suddenly allows her to hear what men are thinking. Using her newfound ability, Ali starts to turn the tables on her obnoxious male colleagues while racing to sign the next basketball superstar.

title: Sleepless in Seattle
subTitle: Realising that Sam has still not come to terms with his wife Maggie's death, his eight-year-old son Jonah forces him to call a national radio talk show, with the hopes of finding him a companion.

title: Shall We Dance?
subTitle: John Clark, a lawyer, finds his marriage losing its spark. In an attempt to find a new passion for himself, he enrols in a dance studio where Paulina catches his eye.

title: Shall We Dance?
subTitle: John Clark, a lawyer, finds his marriage losing its spark. In an attempt to find a new passion for himself, he enrols in a dance studio where Paulina catches his eye.

title: Fallen
subTitle: Detective John Hobbes witnesses the execution of a demonic serial killer, Edgar Reese. However, questions arise when the murders start again, eerily matching the modus operandi of Reese.

title: 50 First Dates
subTitle: Henry falls in love with Lucy, whose short-term memory loss makes her forget him every time she falls asleep. As a result, Henry decides to win her over every day after she wakes up.

title: Pudsey the Dog: The Movie
subTitle: Pudsey, a cheeky stray dog from London, is happy being alone until he meets Molly, George and Tommy. As he settles in with his new family, Pudsey discovers Thorne and Fautus are planning something terrible for the village, and he must stop them.

title: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs 2
subTitle: When Flint learns that his machine is creating dangerous food-animal hybrids on Swallow Falls, he sets out with his friends to save his home. However, they soon realise that they have been deceived.

title: What to Expect When You're Expecting
subTitle: Five couples from Atlanta buckle up to deal with the joys and sorrows of having a baby for the first time. However, they soon realise that parenthood demands a lot more than they anticipated.

title: What's Love Got to Do with It?
subTitle: Zoe is a documentary filmmaker who uses a dating app that only delivers an endless stream of Mr. Wrongs. For Zoe's childhood friend and neighbor, Kaz, the answer is to follow his parents' example and opt for an arranged marriage to a bright and beautiful bride from Pakistan. As Zoe films his hopeful journey to marry a stranger, she begins to wonder if she might have something to learn from a profoundly different approach to finding love.

title: DC League of Super-Pets
subTitle: Superman and his super-dog Krypto share the same power and fight crime together. However, when Superman gets kidnapped, Krypto trains harder to rescue him.

title: The Smurfs 2
subTitle: When Gargamel learns that Smurfette knows a secret spell that can turn Naughties, Smurf-like creatures, into real Smurfs, he kidnaps her. The Smurfs set out to rescue Smurfette.

title: The Back-up Plan
subTitle: A single woman comes across the man of her dreams on the very same day she becomes pregnant through artificial insemination.

title: Surviving Christmas
subTitle: A lonely rude millionaire bribes a family to celebrate Christmas with him.
